acceptance_targets: [CH6-F001] Pass if the revised passage around lines 199-219 shows one concrete post-argument reaction from both Anika and Ravi plus one immediate consequence (for example, food left untouched, document hidden, call ignored, or training altered) before scene transition. Fail if the argument is defused primarily by summary logistics.

[CH6-F002] Pass if the revised scene contains one direct collections phrase on-page and one specific tradeoff decision tied to debt (which bill, shift, or obligation moves). Fail if pressure remains generalized or implied only.

[CH6-F003] Pass if from the first intake question through the billing line-items there are no more than 4 consecutive paragraphs without Anika interiority. Fail if any run of 5+ non-interior paragraphs remains in that span.

[CH6-F004] Pass if the revised intake contains at least 2 leverage shifts (challenge, correction, refusal, or forced clarification) and each speaker has visibly distinct rhythm/register in that span. Fail if the section still reads as mostly form prompts plus direct answers.

[CH6-F005] Pass if the revised late-chapter sequence keeps the debt-math motif but includes at least 2 non-numeric interruption beats that alter what Anika does next. Fail if the run remains primarily list-and-calculation progression.
[CH6-F006] Pass if this construction appears no more than twice in the revised chapter and rewritten instances add concrete action/perception. Fail if all three current instances remain unchanged.

[CH6-F007] Pass if the last two paragraphs imply the debt-obsession turn through concrete action/state change without a direct slogan-image naming the theme. Fail if the ending still states the idea through a literal debt signifier.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passage around lines 199-219 shows one concrete post-argument reaction from both Anika and Ravi plus one immediate consequence (for example, food left untouched, document hidden, call ignored, or training altered) before scene transition. Fail if the argument is defused primarily by summary logistics.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift at the emotional peak: after Ravi's command-voice escalation, the scene exits into procedural domestic summary, which acts as a moral/affective safety valve instead of forcing the reader to sit inside the rupture.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rebuild the confrontation at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:199, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:203, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:211, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:217 so the conflict lands in embodied consequence before logistics resume. Keep one unresolved beat on-page (silence, refusal, physical withdrawal, or concrete financial action) rather than narrating past it.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised scene contains one direct collections phrase on-page and one specific tradeoff decision tied to debt (which bill, shift, or obligation moves). Fail if pressure remains generalized or implied only.
findings.problem: Timidity undercuts pressure: when conversation reaches collections contact and overtime burden, diction turns evasive ("A few times. I dealt with it") and the chapter avoids one fully rendered debt-enforcement moment.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:171, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:187, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:221, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:223, add one concrete collections detail (threat language, escalation window, or fee consequence) and one explicit household tradeoff Ravi makes because of it.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if from the first intake question through the billing line-items there are no more than 4 consecutive paragraphs without Anika interiority. Fail if any run of 5+ non-interior paragraphs remains in that span.
findings.problem: There is a 10+ paragraph interiority blackout during the intake/document block. The close-third focalization drops out into procedure and form-text, making the section read as transcript rather than lived scene.
findings.rewrite_direction: Thread Anika's thought/sensation/memory beats through the intake run at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:29, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:47, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:51 so document detail and focalized experience coexist.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised intake contains at least 2 leverage shifts (challenge, correction, refusal, or forced clarification) and each speaker has visibly distinct rhythm/register in that span. Fail if the section still reads as mostly form prompts plus direct answers.
findings.problem: The intake exchange leans into transcript cadence (field-by-field volley), with limited leverage shifts before the delinquency explanation prompt. Pressure rises conceptually, but dialogue rhythm stays administratively flat for too long.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress repetitive Q&A at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:31, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:35, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:75, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:79; add at least two turns where Nora's procedural stance and Ravi's defensive stance actively collide before snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:89.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised late-chapter sequence keeps the debt-math motif but includes at least 2 non-numeric interruption beats that alter what Anika does next. Fail if the run remains primarily list-and-calculation progression.
findings.problem: Mechanical reuse of Anika's counting/logistics stress pattern flattens prose variance late in the chapter. The motif is character-true, but repeated in close succession it narrows emotional and sensory range.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the calculation-heavy cluster at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:151, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:157, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:255, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:261, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:303 to alternate arithmetic control with conflicting sensory or relational beats that change her immediate choice.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if this construction appears no more than twice in the revised chapter and rewritten instances add concrete action/perception. Fail if all three current instances remain unchanged.
findings.problem: Recurring omission construction ("without + gerund/participle") appears more than twice and reads as a prose tic rather than a deliberate rhythmic choice.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast at least two instances at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:3, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:165, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:275 into active alternatives that show what each character does in the beat.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the last two paragraphs imply the debt-obsession turn through concrete action/state change without a direct slogan-image naming the theme. Fail if the ending still states the idea through a literal debt signifier.
findings.problem: The final movement over-signposts chapter thesis (debt translated into performance arithmetic) and closes on a literal symbolic label, which reduces interpretive tension at the endpoint.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the closing sequence at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:303, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:305, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:311, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:313 so the chapter ends on an observable behavioral or relational consequence rather than explicit symbolic restatement.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when it changes behavior: pain detail, debt arithmetic, manipulative care, and mixed motives. In edge cases, prefer the truest in-character action over protective narration, then carry the real consequence forward instead of immediately moralizing it away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If coercion, grief, injury, or economic shame appears, language must stay specific and embodied; vague softening triggers mandatory rewrite.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for formal authority, deliberate emphasis, or emotional freezing.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count and dialogue density chapter to chapter: rotate match compression, slow inventory aftermath, institutional pressure scenes, and quiet domestic intervals so adjacent chapters do not share the same structural pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary diction with class-aware specificity; avoid abstract therapy language unless a character would actually use it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored in Anika for most chapters, with brief controlled slips toward Ravi in designated confrontation and aftermath chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate clipped athletic sequences with longer reflective cadences; sentence length should track exertion, shame, and release.
